meaning: int.表示兴奋激动的心情时的叫声n.欢庆,喧闹,欢闹,狂欢
examples: I can have a week at home in my own bed before I have to leave for New York. Whoopee!
For kids too young to appreciate the fine points of disco, a step-on whoopee cushion in the carpet of the elevator lobby created plenty of hits and giggles.
So we are beginning to get to really what is going on, and that is not to say, whoopee, everybody lies about sex and we can go ahead and do that.
